title: More Of All
description: A mod that attempts to add literally more of all! From trees to enchants there is literally more of all
body:
More Of All



![Capybaras next to some blueberry bushes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/871e051117335985c2a5802e52418d9308fc8d6d.png)




The goal of More Of All is to add to what already exsists in Minecraft.  As the name suggests this mod attemps to add more of all!



Additions:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Ores Tools Weapons Armor sets: Thallium and Terminite

QoL Items: Chisels, Chainsaw, Hammer, Hidden Item

Mobs: Capybara, Giraffe, Penguin

Armor Trim: Track Smithing Template

Wood Types: Eucalyptus Overworld, Bloodwood Nether, Driftwood End

Food and Crops: Blueberry and Chili

Enchantments: Fireball 1-5, TNT Shot 1-5, Lifesteal 1-3, Call Of Zues 1-5

Sticky Potion Family and Effect

Salvager drop an item you want to salvage on the block ex. Netherite Sword -> Netherite Ingot

And more!

</details>


Goals for the future
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Neoforge port

Update to 1.22 when it releases or any other version

</details>




Enchantment Effects


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

TNT Shot: Bow Enchant: Apon your arrow landing on your target it will summon a block of TNT increasing the amount of TNT summoned per level 6 TNT summoned at level 5.

Call Of Zues: Bow Enchant: Apon your arrow landing on your target it will summon a lightning bolt increasing the amont of bolts summoned per level 6 lightning bolts summoned at level 5.

Fireball: Sword Enchant: When you strike your sword on a target you will summon a fireball at your target's location to activate it swing your sword or shoot it with a bow to make it go hurdling at your enemies, increasing the amont of fireballs summoned per level 6 fireballs summoned at level 5.

Lifesteal: Sword Enchant: Your attacks will heal you 10% of the damage you deal per level.



</details>


You need to know...
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 You Matter!

</details>
